---
title: "prscreening_telefoninterview_frste_kontakt"
subtitle: "`prscreening_telefoninterview_frste_kontakt`"
description: "prscreening_telefoninterview_frste_kontakt"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/prscreening_telefoninterview_frste_kontakt/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                                | Title                                                                     | Type    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|-----------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                             | The unique name of the event                                              | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                     |
| `center`                                            | Research center                                                           | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                  |
| `date_v0`                                           | date_v0                                                                   | date    | Date of visit. Visit 0.                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `staff_initials_v0`                                 | staff_initials_v0                                                         | string  | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 0.                                                                                                                      |
| `aim_phoneinterview_v0`                             | aim_phoneinterview_v0                                                     | string  | Aim of telephone interview explained to the participant. Completed by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                                                            |
| `oral_constent_v0`                                  | oral_constent_v0                                                          | string  | Whether the participant provided verbal consent for registration of information from this telephone interview in REDCap. Completed by study staff. Visit 0.                                            |
| `short_intro_onlimit_v0`                            | short_intro_onlimit_v0                                                    | string  | Study purpose explained to the participant during the telephone interview. Completed by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                                          |
| `info_read_v0`                                      | info_read_v0                                                              | string  | Whether the participant has read the written study information. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                                                      |
| `info_questions_v0`                                 | info_questions_v0                                                         | string  | Whether the participant has any questions at this time regarding the written information. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                            |
| `age_v0`                                            | age_v0                                                                    | number  | Participant's age in years. Self-reported by the participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                                                 |
| `t2d_diagnose_v0`                                   | t2d_diagnose_v0                                                           | string  | Diagnosis status of type 2 diabetes. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                                            |
| `t2d_duration_v0`                                   | t2d_duration_v0                                                           | number  | Number of years since participant was diagnosed with type 2 diabetes. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0. Not filled out from i1050.                                                                |
| `sp_consent_v0`                                     | sp_consent_v0                                                             | string  | Participant consent for lookup in SP. Visit 0. Filled out from i1050.                                                                                                                                  |
| `t2d_duration_v01`                                  | t2d_duration_v01                                                          | string  | Number of years since participant was diagnosed with type 2 diabetes. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0. Filled out from i1050. Derived using the formula: [stamdata_arm_1][t2d_duration_stamdata] |
| `hba1c_v0`                                          | hba1c_v0                                                                  | string  | Recent HbA1c value in mmol/mol. Visit 0.                                                                                                                                                               |
| `height_v0`                                         | height_v0                                                                 | number  | Participant's estimated height in meter. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                                        |
| `weight_v0`                                         | weight_v0                                                                 | number  | Participant's estimated weight in kilograms. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                                    |
| `bmi_v0`                                            | bmi_v0                                                                    | string  | Body Mass Index (BMI) in kg/m², calculated from estimated participant's self-reported weight and height. Visit 0. Derived using the formula: round(([weight_v0])/(([height_v0])^(2)), 1)               |
| `weight_change_v0`                                  | weight_change_v0                                                          | string  | Participant's self-reported weight stability over the past 3 months (±3 kg). Visit 0.                                                                                                                  |
| `weight_difference_v0`                              | weight_difference_v0                                                      | number  | Participant's self-reported weight change over the past 3 months, stated in kilograms (gain or loss). Visit 0.                                                                                         |
| `insulin_use_v0`                                    | insulin_use_v0                                                            | string  | Insulin treatment status within the past 6 months (any type). Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                   |
| `heart_failure_v0`                                  | heart_failure_v0                                                          | string  | Presence of heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (EF < 40%) and current or planned treatment with SGLT-2 inhibitors. Self-repported by participant. Visit 0.                                   |
| `cvd_v0`                                            | cvd_v0                                                                    | string  | Established CVD with prescribed GLP-1 RA and/or SGLT-2 inhibitor. Visit 0. Added from i1022.                                                                                                           |
| `kidney_function_v0`                                | kidney_function_v0                                                        | string  | Presence of kidney disease (eGFR < 60 ml/min) and current or planned treatment with SGLT-2 inhibitors. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                          |
| `physical_health_v0`                                | physical_health_v0                                                        | string  | Presence of physical health problems that prevent participation in planned physical activity during the intervention. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                           |
| `physical_health_example_v0`                        | physical_health_example_v0                                                | string  | Description of physical health problems preventing participation in planned physical activity during the intervention. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                          |
| `food_allergies_v0`                                 | food_allergies_v0                                                         | string  | Presence of dietary restrictions or allergies that prevent adherence to the planned dietary intervention. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                       |
| `food_allergies_example_v0`                         | food_allergies_example_v0                                                 | string  | Description of dietary restrictions or food allergies preventing adherence to the planned diet. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                 |
| `pregnant_v0`                                       | pregnant_v0                                                               | string  | Participant's pregnancy status or plans to become pregnant within the next year. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                |
| `antabus_v0`                                        | antabus_v0                                                                | string  | Participant's history of alcohol or substance abuse, or current treatment for alcohol dependence (including pharmacological treatment). Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                         |
| `psychiatric_disease_v0`                            | psychiatric_disease_v0                                                    | string  | Presence of psychiatric disease. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                                                |
| `psychiatric_disease_specific_v0`                   | psychiatric_disease_specific_v0                                           | string  | Specification of psychiatric disease. Visit 0. Added from ID i1022.                                                                                                                                    |
| `psychiatric_disease_medication_change_v0`          | psychiatric_disease_medication_change_v0                                  | string  | Any changes in psychiatric medication within the last 3 months. Visit 0. Added from ID i1022.                                                                                                          |
| `psychiatric_disease_medication_change_specific_v0` | psychiatric_disease_medication_change_specific_v0                         | string  | Specification of changes in psychiatric medication within the last 3 months. Visit 1. Visit 0. Added from ID i1022.                                                                                    |
| `psychiatric_hospitalization_v0`                    | psychiatric_hospitalization_v0                                            | string  | Whether the participant has had any acute psychiatric visits or hospital admissions within the last 6 months. Visit 0. Added from ID i1022.                                                            |
| `psychiatric_disease_barrier_v0`                    | psychiatric_disease_barrier_v0                                            | string  | Whether the participant's mental condition (other than those previously mentioned) is considered to prevent study participation. Assesed by study staff. Visit 0. Added from ID i1022.                 |
| `psychiatric_disease_barrier_reason_v0`             | psychiatric_disease_barrier_reason_v0                                     | string  | Specify the reason why the mental condition is considered to prevent study participation. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0. Added from ID i1022.                                                       |
| `binge_eating_v0`                                   | binge_eating_v0                                                           | string  | Diagnosis status of binge eating disorder. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                                                      |
| `other_intervention_v0`                             | other_intervention_v0                                                     | string  | Participation status or plans to participate in another intervention study (medical or lifestyle) involving alternative treatment. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                              |
| `language_barrier_v0`                               | language_barrier_v0                                                       | string  | Participant's difficulties in understanding Danish, both written and spoken. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                                                                                    |
| `compliance_risk_v0`                                | compliance_risk_v0                                                        | string  | Assessment of whether the participant is likely to comply with study procedures and/or interventions (e.g., attendance, measurements, counselling). Assessed by study staff. Visit 0.                  |
| `compliance_risk_expl_v0`                           | compliance_risk_expl_v0                                                   | string  | Notes explaining the assessment of the participant's likelihood to comply with study procedures and/or interventions. Reported by study staff. Visit 0.                                                |
| `eligible_v0`                                       | eligible_v0                                                               | string  | Assessment of whether the participant remains eligible to participate in the study after prescreening. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0.                                                               |
| `continue_v0`                                       | continue_v0                                                               | string  | Whether the participant wishes to continue in the study after the telephone interview - prescreening. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                |
| `visit1_booking_type_v0`                            | visit1_booking_type_v0                                                    | string  | Participant's preference regarding the booking of the information and screening visit. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0. Field introduced from i1021.                                                  |
| `book_sp_v0`                                        | book_sp_v0                                                                | string  | Booking of V1 in SP. Visit 0. Field introduced from i1021.                                                                                                                                             |
| `book_outlook_v0`                                   | book_outlook_v0                                                           | string  | Booking of V1 in outlook. Visit 0. Field introduced from i1021.                                                                                                                                        |
| `mail_v0`                                           | mail_v0                                                                   | string  | Secure email with information about the screening visit has been sent to the participant. Visit 0. Field introduced from i1021.                                                                        |
| `relative_v1_v0`                                    | relative_v1_v0                                                            | string  | Participant's preference to have a relative accompany them to Visit 1. Recorded by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                                               |
| `book_online_meeting_v0`                            | book_online_meeting_v0                                                    | string  | Booking of online information meeting. Visit 0. Field introduced from i1021.                                                                                                                           |
| `comments_end_v0`                                   | comments_end_v0                                                           | string  | General comments and observations recorded. Free-text notes by study staff. Visit 0.                                                                                                                   |
| `treatment_v0___1`                                  | Livstilbehandling (f.eks. forløb hos diætist, træningsforløb eller andet) | boolean | Current treatment approach for type 2 diabetes - lifestyle changes and/or oral antidiabetic medication and/or GLP-1 receptor agonist. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                           |
| `treatment_v0___2`                                  | Oral antidiabetisk medicin                                                | boolean | Current treatment approach for type 2 diabetes - lifestyle changes and/or oral antidiabetic medication and/or GLP-1 receptor agonist. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                           |
| `treatment_v0___3`                                  | GLP-1 RA                                                                  | boolean | Current treatment approach for type 2 diabetes - lifestyle changes and/or oral antidiabetic medication and/or GLP-1 receptor agonist. Self-reported by participant. Visit 0.                           |

: Fields in the `prscreening_telefoninterview_frste_kontakt` resource.
